title: Download YouTube Video with yt-dlp
summary: Download YouTube videos with resumable fragments, explicit format sorting, and optional proxy support.
verification_setup: Install yt-dlp and ffmpeg before running the command.
Replace the proxy URL and YouTube URL placeholders, or remove the proxy line if you do not need one.
Run the command from a writable directory.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the substitution and execution checklist.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the proxy URL and video URL placeholders before running with yt-dlp, ffmpeg, and network access.
